design_philosophy.description: A dark, immersive, appetite-inducing interface that balances the warmth of a stone oven with the precision of a digital system.
core_principles: Appetite First: Colors and imagery must trigger hunger (warm oranges, deep browns, golden yellows).
Clarity in Chaos: Kitchen and Cashier views must be high-contrast and instantly readable from a distance.
Tactile Dark Mode: Avoid flat #000. Use layered shades of warm charcoal and stone to create depth.
Motion for Feedback: Every interaction (add to cart, complete order) has immediate visual response.

headings.usage: Page titles, Category headers, Product names, Ticket numbers

body.usage: Descriptions, Prices, Kitchen instructions, Interface labels

usage_rules: NEVER use pure black (#000000). Use Stone-950 (#0c0a09) for backgrounds.
Primary Orange is for 'Add to Cart' and 'Call to Action' only.
Kitchen tickets: New = Yellow border/glow, Late = Red border/glow, Ready = Green border/glow.
Price tags should be prominent, using the Secondary Yellow or bright White.

customer_menu.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8

kitchen_board.classes: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4

checkout.classes: flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 max-w-6xl mx-auto p-6

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(234,88,12,0.39)] transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-800 hover:bg-stone-700 text-stone-200 font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-xl border border-stone-700 transition-colors
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-full bg-stone-800 hover:bg-stone-700 text-white transition-colors

cards.menu_item: bg-stone-900 border border-stone-800 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-colors duration-300 group relative
cards.kitchen_ticket: bg-stone-900 border-l-4 rounded-r-lg shadow-md p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-stone-950 border border-stone-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-stone-600

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture overlay on the main background with opacity 0.03 to reduce digital flatness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom Stone and Orange palette.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the responsive navigation (Bottom bar for mobile, Sidebar for desktop).
Use 'Bebas Neue' for all headings to give that 'Menu Board' feel.
Ensure the 'Kitchen View' auto-refreshes or uses websockets (if available) - UI must show status changes clearly.
Implement the 'Cart' as a sliding drawer on mobile and a sticky column on desktop.
For the 'Cashier' view, prioritize data density over big images - use a table layout.
ADD data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.layout: Do not center everything. Use asymmetry to create interest. Use negative space (padding) generously.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.interaction: Buttons must have hover and active states. No dead clicks.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios (Stone-400 on Stone-950 is borderline, use Stone-300 for important text).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.code_structure: Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dialogs, Sheets) but style them with the custom palette.
